title: largest coalesced free run (allocator)
statement: From docs/basket/spec-allocator.md §3.6/A22 (coalescing of adjacent free blocks). A region is carved into `n` contiguous blocks; block `i` has byte size `size[i]` and is free iff `free[i]`. When adjacent blocks are all free they coalesce into one contiguous free span whose size is the sum of their sizes. Define `struct Blocks { size: [16]usize, free: [16]bool, n: u32 }` and `fn largest_free_run(b: read Blocks) -> usize` returning the byte size of the largest run of adjacent free blocks among blocks `0 .. n` (0 if none are free). Define only these items.
